title: Inspect Notion Page Write
description: Inspect a Notion remote page write request before anything is sent.
prompt: Inspect the proposed Notion page publish, send, or write request. Summarize the target, source context, and risk before any remote write is attempted. Do not send anything to Notion during inspection.

fields.name: input
fields.description: Optional saved artifact reference or proposed Notion write context to inspect before any remote write.

fields.name: items
fields.description: Remote write inspection proof timeline item.
